source.author: SSA Catalog
source.notes: All-purpose classic shawarma spice blend for chicken, beef, lamb, and vegetables—balanced, warm, and aromatic.

ingredients.label: Ground cardamom
notes: About 3/8 teaspoon; optional but classic in many blends.

ingredients.label: Garlic powder
notes: About 2 teaspoons; optional but practical for dry rubs.

ingredients.label: Ground ginger
notes: About 3/4 teaspoon; adds lift and warmth.

ingredients.label: Ground nutmeg
notes: About 1/3 teaspoon; optional for round warmth.

ingredients.label: Smoked paprika
notes: About 1 teaspoon; optional for grilled/roasted depth.

steps.title: Mix the blend
instructions: Add all spices to a bowl or jar.
Whisk (or shake in a sealed jar) until evenly combined and uniform in color.

steps.title: How to use (application notes)
instructions: All-purpose dry rub: use ~8–14 g (1–1 1/2 tbsp) per 450 g (1 lb) meat/veg, plus salt to taste.
Marinade shortcut (per 900 g / 2 lb): 18–28 g blend (2–3 tbsp) + 30 ml oil + 30–45 ml lemon juice/vinegar + garlic (fresh) + salt; add yogurt for chicken/lean meats.
Vegetables: toss 900–1200 g veg with 15–25 g blend (1 1/2–2 1/2 tbsp) + 30 ml oil + salt; roast hot for browning.

steps.title: Storage
instructions: Store in an airtight jar away from heat and light.
Best flavor within 3–6 months; usable longer but aroma fades.

steps.title: Batch notes
instructions: This recipe yields about 85–95 g spice blend (varies by grind).
Scale up easily for bulk prep and catalog usage.
